summary.lv: BTA meklē Full-Stack izstrādātāju ar Java/Spring Boot back-end pieredzi un React/TypeScript priekšgalā, kā arī pieredzi mākoņplatformās (AWS/Azure) un DevOps praksēs (Terraform, CloudFormation).
summary.en: BTA is hiring a Full-Stack Developer with Java/Spring Boot on the back-end, React/TypeScript on the front-end, and cloud (AWS/Azure) + DevOps (Terraform, CloudFormation) experience.
